creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

On 08/28/11 02:54, Ruslan Mahmatkhanov wrote:
> Steve Wills wrote on 28.08.2011 06:34:
>>
>> Sorry, this update builds clean, but breaks at least www/rubygem-cuba
>> and www/rubygem-sinatra and possibly others. Can't commit it until those
>> issues are fixed.
> 
> Ok, so maybe maintainer should be changed to ruby@, since i added this
> port only to update www/sinatra to version 1.1.2?
> 

That may not be a bad idea, but this issue is specific to this version
of tilt. It causes this error:

Invalid gemspec in
[/usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/1.8/specifications/tilt-1.3.3.gemspec]:
invalid date format in specification: "2011-08-25 00:00:00.000000000Z"

It seems to be gems related:

https://github.com/rtomayko/tilt/pull/104

I'm hoping the upcoming update to ruby-gems will help.

Steve
